heading: Interface Endpoints
body:
To delete the Azure (Microsoft Azure) private endpoint interface you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints azure interfaces delete <privateEndpointResourceId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints azure interfaces delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-azure-interfaces-delete).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

- Click the Private Endpoint tab.

- Next to the private endpoint you want to remove, click
  Terminate.

- To confirm, click Confirm in the dialog box.

**GCP Private Service Connect:**

GCP Private Service Connect

**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI
